hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host -ForegroundColor Cyan '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; Write-Host -ForegroundColor Green '✅ 서브에이전트 작업 완료!' -BackgroundColor Black; Write-Host -ForegroundColor Cyan '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'; [Console]::Beep(1200, 200); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; [Console]::Beep(1200, 200); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; [Console]::Beep(1200, 200); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; [Console]::Beep(1200, 200)"
